mapper.select: SELECT project_id AS projectId, project_title AS projectTitle, project_describe AS projectDescribe, project_identifier AS projectIdentifier, created_at AS createdAt, finish_date AS finishDate, status AS status FROM project WHERE project_id = #{projectId}

SELECT g.group_name AS groupName, COUNT(m.member_id) AS memberCount, LISTAGG(u.user_name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY u.user_name) AS memberNames FROM members m JOIN users u ON m.user_code = u.user_code LEFT JOIN groups g ON u.group_id = g.group_id WHERE m.project_id = #{projectId} GROUP BY g.group_name ORDER BY g.group_name ASC

SELECT NVL(SUM(estimated_time), 0) AS totalEstimatedHours, NVL(SUM(spent_hours_sum), 0) AS totalSpentHours, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN task_status = 'e3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100) ELSE 0 END AS progressPercentage FROM task WHERE project_id = #{projectId}

SELECT CASE task_status WHEN 'e1' THEN '신규' WHEN 'e2' THEN '진행 중' WHEN 'e3' THEN '완료' WHEN 'e4' THEN '결함' ELSE '미지정' END AS groupName, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN task_status = 'e3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS closedCount FROM task WHERE project_id = #{projectId} GROUP BY task_status

SELECT priority AS groupName, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN task_status = 'e3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS closedCount FROM task WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND priority IS NOT NULL GROUP BY priority

SELECT tp.type_name AS groupName, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN t.task_status = 'e3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS closedCount FROM task t JOIN task_types tp ON t.type_id = tp.type_id WHERE project_id = #{projectId} GROUP BY tp.type_name, t.type_id

SELECT NVL(u.user_name, '미지정') AS groupName, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN t.task_status = 'e3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS closedCount FROM task t LEFT JOIN users u ON t.task_manager = u.user_code WHERE t.project_id = #{projectId} GROUP BY u.user_name
